---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or a change to an existing one
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

### Problem

What are you trying to do, and what makes the current state inadequate.

### Proposed direction

Sketch the API, instruction, or flow you have in mind. Don't fully design it
in the issue, but enough that we can debate scope.

### Alternatives considered

What else could solve this, and why is your proposal better.

### Impact

- [ ] On-chain program surface change
- [ ] SDK public API change
- [ ] CLI command change
- [ ] Internal only

### Willing to implement?

- [ ] yes, with guidance
- [ ] yes, but I'd like a maintainer to own review closely
- [ ] no, tracking only
